Package com.rays.config

Class JWTUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.config.JWTUtil
  • @Component
public class JWTUtil
extends java.lang.Object
    JWTUtil is a utility class for generating and validating JSON Web Tokens (JWT). This class handles JWT creation with HS256 algorithm, token validation, and extraction of claims from the token. It uses HMAC-SHA256 for signing and Base64 URL encoding for token parts.
    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      java.lang.String extractLoginId​(java.lang.String token)
      Extracts the login ID from the JWT token.
      java.lang.String extractRole​(java.lang.String token)
      Extracts the user role from the JWT token.
      java.lang.Long extractUserId​(java.lang.String token)
      Extracts the user ID from the JWT token.
      java.lang.String generateToken​(java.lang.Long userId, java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String role)
      Generates a new JWT token with the specified user information.
      boolean validateToken​(java.lang.String token, java.lang.String expectedLoginId)
      Validates a JWT token against the expected login ID.

    • Method Detail

      • generateToken

        public java.lang.String generateToken​(java.lang.Long userId,
                                      java.lang.String loginId,
                                      java.lang.String role)
                               throws java.lang.Exception
        Generates a new JWT token with the specified user information.
        Parameters:
        userId - the user ID
        loginId - the login ID (subject)
        role - the user role
        Returns:
        a JWT token as a string
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if an error occurs during token generation

      • validateToken

        public boolean validateToken​(java.lang.String token,
                             java.lang.String expectedLoginId)
                      throws java.lang.Exception
        Validates a JWT token against the expected login ID.
        Parameters:
        token - the JWT token to validate
        expectedLoginId - the expected login ID
        Returns:
        true if the token is valid, false otherwise
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if validation fails with specific error message

      • extractLoginId

        public java.lang.String extractLoginId​(java.lang.String token)
        Extracts the login ID from the JWT token.
        Parameters:
        token - the JWT token
        Returns:
        the login ID

      • extractUserId

        public java.lang.Long extractUserId​(java.lang.String token)
        Extracts the user ID from the JWT token.
        Parameters:
        token - the JWT token
        Returns:
        the user ID

      • extractRole

        public java.lang.String extractRole​(java.lang.String token)
        Extracts the user role from the JWT token.
        Parameters:
        token - the JWT token
        Returns:
        the user role
